title: Wooden Peg Puzzles, Sea Creature Chunky Baby Puzzle, Colorful Wood Shape Puzzle Peg Board, Animal Knob Puzzles for Educational Toddlers 18 Months and Up, 11 Pieces
features: EXPLORE THE UNDERWATER WORLD: Spark your child's curiosity with this engaging wooden puzzle featuring 11 friendly sea animals! Includes a Turtle, Crab, Starfish, Dolphin, Seahorse, and Fish to teach names and recognition of ocean life.

DEVELOP ESSENTIAL SKILLS: More than just a toy! This puzzle is designed to develop fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and problem-solving abilities. The easy-grip pegs are perfect for little hands to grasp, place, and remove the pieces.

LEARNING THROUGH PLAY: The bright, kid-friendly colours and clear shapes help with colour and shape recognition. Matching each piece to its correct spot encourages cognitive development, memory, and logical thinking in a fun, Montessori-inspired way.

SAFE & CHILD-FRIENDLY: Crafted from high-quality, durable wood with a smooth, splinter-free finish. We use non-toxic, child-safe paints and coatings. The chunky pegs and sturdy puzzle board are built to withstand years of playful learning.

THE PERFECT GIFT: Beautifully presented, this ocean puzzle makes a wonderful birthday, Christmas, or holiday gift for toddlers aged 1, 2, and 3. It's an ideal educational toy for boys and girls that parents and grandparents can feel great about giving.
